violations.text: The presence of Bees is not controlled as evidenced by an abundance of bees flying around the open end of the bar container unit. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Per the PIC, the pest control company being used is currently addressing the bee problem. Call was made for further service at the time of inspection. Pest control to arrive same day. New Violation. Correct By: 09/03/2025

The reach-in cooler to the bar container unit was observed to be maintaining an ambient temperature of 51 degrees Fahrenheit. Refrigerator was observed not being used for Time/Temperature Control for Safety Foods (TCS Foods) at the time of inspection. Unit is to be monitored for proper cold holding prior to use for TCS Foods. New Violation. Correct By: 08/20/2025

The dumpster outside is located on stone/gravel. The outdoor storage surface for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must be constructed of nonabsorbent material such as concrete or asphalt and must be smooth, durable, and sloped to drain. New Violation. Correct By: 07/11/2025
-Insufficient lighting observed in the walk-in cooler trailer. Per interview of staff, establishment will put in a light fixture. New Violation. Correct By: 06/26/2025
